name: First Impression Credit Repair
description_short: Chicago-based credit repair service that disputes negative items including collections, late payments, and bankruptcies. Currently operates 24/7 with significant customer service concerns.
description_long:
First Impression Credit Repair is a credit repair company based in Chicago, IL, operating from 7000 W North Ave, Suite 2A. The company markets itself as a solution for consumers dealing with various negative credit report items and financial challenges. They can be reached at (786) 501-9334 or via text at 708-402-8502.

The company offers credit dispute and repair services targeting consumers with hard inquiries, collections accounts, late payments, repossessions, foreclosures, bankruptcies, charge-offs, and incorrect personal information on their credit reports. They position themselves as providing legal credit cleaning and repair to help improve credit scores and facilitate approval for credit cards, business funding, car loans, and apartment applications.

First Impression operates 24/7 across all seven days of the week, suggesting round-the-clock availability. The company appears to accept upfront consultation and service fees, with customers reporting payments of $500 per month or larger lump sums for repair services. One positive review from 2020 mentioned achieving "amazing results" despite initial concerns during the COVID period.

However, the company has substantial negative feedback. Out of 5 reviews on Yelp, 4 are one-star ratings citing theft, fraud, non-performance, failure to refund consultation fees, lack of communication, absence of transaction receipts, and complete failure to deliver promised services. Multiple reviewers name specific staff members (Shay Blunt, Brandie McMahan) associated with money taken without service delivery. This pattern of complaints suggests serious operational and ethical issues that significantly outweigh the single positive review.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers dispute services for multiple negative credit items: collections, late payments, repossessions, foreclosures, bankruptcies, and charge-offs
Claims to address incorrect or conflicting personal information on credit reports
24/7 availability across all days of the week
Multiple contact methods: phone, text line, and in-person location
One documented positive review citing 'amazing results' from 2020
Explicitly states commitment to legal credit repair methods
Targets comprehensive financial needs including credit cards, business funding, and apartment/car approvals
cons: 80% of available reviews are one-star ratings citing fraud, theft, and non-performance (4 of 5 reviews)
Multiple customers report paying $500-$4,000 with zero services delivered or results provided
Documented pattern of non-refundable consultation fees with no follow-up consultation
Customers report inability to contact company, receive receipts, or get communication after payment
Named staff members (Shay Blunt, Brandie McMahan) specifically cited for poor customer service and taking money without delivering services
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative credit items who want dispute services through a local Chicago provider
Those seeking 24/7 availability for credit repair inquiries
diagnosis: First Impression Credit Repair may appeal to Chicago-area consumers seeking aggressive credit disputes for serious negative items, but the overwhelming evidence of non-performance, payment theft, and communication failures presents severe risk. This company should be approached with extreme caution; the 80% one-star review rate with consistent fraud allegations substantially outweighs the single positive review and suggests systemic operational failures.
services: Late payment removal from credit reports
Car and apartment approval credit preparation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7000 W North Ave Ste 2A, Chicago, IL 60707
